## Templates Changes

### Description
Brief description of template changes

### Type of Change
- [ ] New template added
- [ ] Update existing template configuration
- [ ] Fix template validation errors
- [ ] Update template metadata
- [ ] Add/update template assets (images, icons)
- [ ] Remove deprecated template

### Checklist
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My template configuration follows the schema
- [ ] I have run `python validate.py` in the templates directory
- [ ] I have validated the JSON structure
- [ ] Template metadata is complete (name, description, category, tags)
- [ ] Template repository URL is valid and accessible
- [ ] Template icon/image URLs are valid

### Template Validation
- [ ] Configuration validates against schema
- [ ] All required fields are present
- [ ] Template repository is accessible
- [ ] Template can be deployed successfully
- [ ] README in template repo is complete

### Template Details (if adding new template)
<!-- For new templates, provide:
- **Name**: Template display name
- **Category**: Which category does this belong to?
- **Description**: Brief description (1-2 sentences)
- **Repository**: Template repository URL
- **Use Cases**: What problems does this template solve?
- **Tech Stack**: Main technologies used
-->

### Template Configuration
```json
<!-- Paste the template configuration here -->
```

### Testing
- [ ] Deployed template successfully from Phala Cloud
- [ ] Verified all environment variables work correctly
- [ ] Tested the deployed application functionality
- [ ] Verified the template shows correctly in the UI

### Screenshots (if applicable)
<!-- Add screenshots of:
- Template card in the templates gallery
- Deployed application
-->

### Additional Notes
